STORY

About Us

The Mission

The Story

ComplaineNepal was born out of the need for a direct, transparent channel between the people and those responsible for public services. We believe that technology can bridge the gap of accountability.

Built for a better Nepal.

Our Mission

Empowering every citizen of Nepal with a voice to report local issues and hold authorities accountable.

Our Vision

A transparent Nepal where infrastructure and services are maintained through active civic participation.

Who We Are

We are a small but passionate team of teenagers from Nepal, dedicated to leveraging technology for civic accountability.

Yunish Bhatta

Your Friend

Aasis Bagale
